hero.sectionName: Royal Gujarati Christian Wedding Hero – Kavya & Mihir
hero.html:
॥ શુભ વિવાહ ॥

ॐ गणेशाय नमः

કાવ્યા Kavya
&
મિહિર Mihir
Date March 22, 2026 રવિવાર · Sunday
Venue Akshar Grand Palace Somerset, New Jersey

With blessings of Shri Ganesh and our families, we invite you to celebrate a joyful Gujarati wedding filled with mehendi, garba, baraat, sacred pheras, dinner, music, and love.

Mehendi ✦ Garba ✦ Baraat ✦ Pheras ✦ Dinner & Music
RSVP Now · પ્રતિભાવ આપો
hero.designNotes: Royal Gujarati Hindu Wedding hero for Kavya & Mihir — no image, full decorative layout. Design direction: warm gold-on-ivory palace palette with deep marigold (#f4a623), forest green toran, and rich brown typography. Key features: (1) CSS-only toran strip at top with leaf silhouettes and center marigold bloom; (2) Asymmetric arch panels flanking the hero with striped texture; (3) Oversized Cormorant Garamond name typography with animated dashed ring ampersand; (4) Noto Serif Gujarati script labels for cultural authenticity; (5) Frosted glass date/venue card with gold border; (6) Floating marigold petal elements animated with staggered keyframes; (7) Mandala watermark at base built from concentric CSS ring shadows, slowly rotating; (8) Gold gradient CTA button with hover lift; (9) Ganesh invocation and Gujarati badge for cultural warmth; (10) All animations are CSS-only, no JS. Fully responsive at 900px and 640px breakpoints with stacked names and collapsed glass card on mobile.
